entries.title: How Revolut runs AI at scale
entries.raw_summary: Nikolay Donets, Revolut's Head of Machine Learning Engineering, discussed managing AI deployment across a regulated bank serving 70M+ customers. The approach centers on a single gateway, use-case governance, fallback chains, and human oversight of critical decisions.
entries.rationale: 7000万用户银行ML部署方法论，可复用洞察

entries.title: Dwarkesh Patel：下一代AI，可能是干活干出来的
entries.raw_summary: 硅谷科技播客主持人 Dwarkesh Patel 探讨 AI 下一代训练范式，提出 RLVR（可验证奖励强化学习）是关键，并指出真实世界任务需要 AI 从发布前训练走向发布后学习。
entries.rationale: RLVR训练范式播客评论，二手媒体归杂项

entries.title: Latest open artifacts (#22): Zyphra, Cohere, and Poolside are expanding the breadth of the ecosystem
entries.raw_summary: Assessment of the open ecosystem showing increasing diversity in model releases. Companies span pure model makers, Big Tech, and product companies with varied motivations for releasing weights. Highlights NVIDIA Nemotron-3 Ultra, Cohere Command A+, GLM-5.2, Zyphra ZAYA1, and Poolside Laguna-M.1 models.
entries.rationale: 5款开源模型纵览+生态多样性深度分析

entries.title: Macrodata: Robots need a data refinery
entries.raw_summary: Former Hugging Face researchers launched Macrodata to refine physical AI training data. Their open-source Refiner tool standardizes incompatible robot sensor formats and handles preprocessing tasks like trimming idle motion and reward scoring for policy training.
entries.rationale: 物理AI数据标准化开源工具，前HF团队出品

entries.title: STARK raises €500M to build Europe's next defense prime
entries.raw_summary: German defense company STARK announced a €500M funding round to manufacture autonomous unmanned strike systems. The capital will support production lines across Germany, the UK, and Ukraine for weapons like the Virtus loitering munition.
entries.rationale: 欧洲防务€500M融资，AI赋能无人武器系统

entries.title: Odyssey raises $310M Series B for world models
entries.raw_summary: World model startup Odyssey closed a $310M Series B at $1.45B valuation to build interactive, persistent AI-generated environments. Products include Starchild-1 for multimodal generation, Agora-1 for shared multiplayer worlds, and PROWL for self-directed improvement.
entries.rationale: 世界模型赛道$310M独角兽融资，新兴方向里程碑

entries.title: Testing Mythos and Fable, Moving Beyond SWE-bench, Nvidia's Open Contender
entries.raw_summary: Both the U.S. Government and Anthropic took significant actions to demonstrate their power to control access to AI by restricting what others can do with frontier models.
entries.rationale: 美政府+Anthropic限制前沿模型访问权，安全政策
